name: Skillet Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 small can (15 oz) cannellini beans or Great Northern beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the cubed red and green bell peppers to a skillet.
2. Saute the peppers in water until they are tender.
3. Drain and rinse the chopped onion, black beans, kidney beans, pinto beans, cannellini or Great Northern beans, and tomatoes.
4. Add the cooked beans, tomatoes, barbecue sauce, and 1 cup of water to the skillet.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Cook for a minimum of 15 minutes, up to 2 hours, until the flavors have melded.
7. Top with cooked long grain rice (cooked) and serve.
